items.title: Oil tops $101 before dipping as Iran ramps up strikes and IEA calls conflict biggest supply disruption in history

items.title_es: El economista ganador del premio Nobel advierte que Estados Unidos está al borde de la estanflación

items.title: Larry Ellison lost his title of the world’s richest person last year — but has just gained a chunk of money back
